name: The Life RPG
description:
The universe is currently expanding into a freezing, lightless void, but your most pressing issue is that the Wi-Fi just dropped and your lower back inexplicably hurts.

This is the grand, terrifying theater of the mundane.

Here, the laws of physics aren't governed by gravity, but by the crushing weight of consequence. Every action has an equal, opposite, and usually exhausting reaction. Chase the cheap dopamine hit of a glowing screen at 3 AM, and you sacrifice the energy needed to pretend you care about your morning meeting. Spend weeks grinding to climb the corporate ladder, and you might just look up to realize you haven't spoken to your own mother in a month.

There are no chosen ones here, no ancient prophecies to fulfill, and absolutely no background music to make your suffering look cinematic. You might be a brilliant mind paralyzed by a mountain of unfinished work, or you might be a high-functioning executive realizing that a meticulously balanced stock portfolio doesn't actually keep you warm at night.

This is the raw, unedited footage of existence.

You are armed with nothing but finite time, rapidly depleting energy, and the terrifying freedom to either ruin your life entirely or quietly build something beautiful.

Try not to fuck it up.
creator: D'al Cazarosta
